name: QueryOptimizationAdvisor

neutralConcepts: T184 produces suggestions only — it NEVER executes queries
Query optimization patterns are tenant-scoped — no cross-tenant pattern leakage
T187 QuotaManager quota check is NOT required for read-only advisor (no warehouse read)
Suggestions are stateless recommendations — no storeDocument required for advisor output

ironRules.rule: T184 is READ-ONLY — it produces suggestions only. NEVER execute a query inside the advisor. Query execution is T173's domain.
Query optimization patterns are tenant-scoped — never expose patterns from one tenant's queries to another tenant.
T187 QuotaManager quota check is NOT required for T184 (read-only advisor incurs no warehouse read cost). Do not add quota check.

keywords: query optimization advisor read-only suggestions tenant-scoped patterns no quota check warehouse analytics
